name: middlebro
description: A session-scoped security organism for AI agents. Detects and blocks prompt injection, context poisoning, and indirect injection before they reach the model.

scripts.flow:start: MIDDLEBRO_ENABLED=true MIDDLEBRO_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4141/v1 OPENAI_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 OPENAI_API_KEY=ollama npm run start -- --mode monitor --port 4141 --target http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 --reasoner-provider openai --reasoner-model gpt-oss:20b --reasoner-base-url http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 --reasoner-key ollama
scripts.flow:demo: MIDDLEBRO_ENABLED=true MIDDLEBRO_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4141/v1 MIDDLEBRO_DEMO_MODEL=gpt-oss:20b OPENAI_API_KEY=ollama npm run demo
scripts.flow:evals: MIDDLEBRO_ENABLED=true MIDDLEBRO_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4141/v1 MIDDLEBRO_PROVIDER=openai MIDDLEBRO_MODEL=gpt-oss:20b MIDDLEBRO_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 MIDDLEBRO_API_KEY=ollama OPENAI_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 OPENAI_API_KEY=ollama npm run evals
